privileged_info_summary: The task uses the Chinook database, a real, publicly available sample database from GitHub (https://github.com/lerocha/chinook-database) based on iTunes Library data, containing 3503 tracks with columns including TrackId, Name, and Composer. The task imports synthetic audio features (BPM, Key, Danceability, Energy, analysis_version) generated for 100 random tracks from the database. The CSV uses pipe-delimiters with no quoting. The filter criteria are BPM > 130 and Danceability > 0.7. All file paths, table names (TrackFeatures), view names (v_TrackExtended), and filter thresholds claimed in metadata match the task description and implementation scripts.
